chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of Lending

text: 1697 - قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «مَكْتُوبٌ عَلَى بَابِ اَلْجَنَّةِ اَلصَّدَقَةُ بِعَشَرَةٍ وَ اَلْقَرْضُ بِثَمَانِيَةَ عَشَرَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1697 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"It is written on the gate of Paradise: Charity is rewarded tenfold, and a loan is rewarded eighteenfold."
